Items.Title: 建立聊天 - 使用 React、Websockets 和 Web-Push 的浏览器通知🤯 | Building a chat - Browser Notifications with React, Websockets and Web-Push 🤯
Items.Description:
我们都遇到过网络聊天，可以是 Facebook、Instagram、Whatsapp 等等。
只是为了提供一些背景信息，您向一个人或一个组发送一条消息，他们看到该消息并回复。 简单而复杂。

在本系列的上一篇文章中，我们讨论了Socket.io ，如何在 React 应用程序客户端和 Socket.io 服务器之间发送消息，如何在 Web 应用程序中获取活跃用户，以及如何添加“User is打字...”功能存在于大多数现代聊天应用程序中。

在最后一篇文章中，我们将扩展聊天应用程序的功能。 您将了解如何通过在用户不在线时向他们发送桌面通知来保持用户的参与度，以及如何阅读消息并将其保存在 JSON 文件中。 但是，这不是在聊天应用程序中存储消息的安全方式。 在构建您的数据库时，请随意使用您选择的任何数据库。

如何向用户发送桌面消息

在这里，我将指导您在离线用户有新聊天消息时向他们发送桌面通知。

在上一篇文章中，我们创建了ChatFooter组件，其中包含一个带有输入字段和发送按钮的表单。 由于我们将在用户发送消息后立即发送通知，这就是桌面通知功能存在的地方。

请按照以下步骤操作：

更新ChatFooter.js组件以包含一个名为checkPageStatus的函数，该函数在消息发送到 Socket.io 服务器后运行。 该函数接受用户名和用户的消息。

 import React , { useState } from ' react ' const ChatFooter = ({ socket }) => { const [ message , setMessage ] = useState ( "" ) const handleTyping = () => socket . emit ( " typing " , ` ${ localStorage . getItem ( " userName " )} is typing` ) const handleSendMessage = ( e ) => { e . preventDefault () if ( message . trim () && localStorage . getItem ( " userName " )) { socket . emit ( " message " , { text : message , name : localStorage . getItem ( " userName " ), id : ` ${ socket . id }${ Math . random ()} ` }) //Here it is 👇🏻 checkPageStatus ( message , localStorage . getItem ( " userName " )) }} setMessage ( "" ) } //Check PageStatus Function const checkPageStatus = () => { } return ( < div className = 'chat__footer' > < form className = 'form' onSubmit = { handleSendMessage } > < input type = "text" placeholder = 'Write message' className = 'message' value = { message } onChange = { e => setMessage ( e . target . value ) } onKeyDown = { handleTyping } /> < button className = "sendBtn" > SEND </ button > </ form > </ div > ) } export default ChatFooter

通过将checkPageStatus函数移动到src/utils文件夹来整理ChatFooter组件。 创建一个名为utils的文件夹。

在包含checkPageStatus函数的utils文件夹中创建一个 JavaScript 文件。

 cd utils touch functions.js

将以下代码复制到functions.js文件中。

 export default function checkPageStatus ( message , user ){ }

更新ChatFooter组件以包含utils/functions.js文件中新创建的函数。

 import React , { useState } from ' react ' import checkPageStatus from " ../utils/functions " //....Remaining codes

您现在可以更新functions.js文件中的函数，如下所示：

 export default function checkPageStatus ( message , user ) { if ( ! ( " Notification " in window )) { alert ( " This browser does not support system notifications! " ) } else if ( Notification . permission === " granted " ) { sendNotification ( message , user ) } else if ( Notification . permission !== " denied " ) { Notification . requestPermission (( permission ) => { if ( permission === " granted " ) { sendNotification ( message , user ) } }) } }

在上面的代码片段中， JavaScript 通知 API用于配置通知并向用户显示通知。 它具有代表其当前状态的三个属性。 他们是：

  • 拒绝 - 不允许通知。
  • 授予 - 允许通知。
  • 默认 - 用户选择是未知的，因此浏览器的行为就像通知被禁用一样。 第一个条件语句 (if) 检查JavaScript 通知 API在 Web 浏览器上是否不可用，然后提醒用户浏览器不支持桌面通知。

    第二个条件语句检查是否允许通知，然后调用sendNotification函数。

    最后一个条件语句检查通知是否未被禁用，然后在发送通知之前请求权限状态。

    接下来，创建上面代码片段中引用的sendNotification函数。

     //utils/functions.js function sendNotification ( message , user ) { } export default function checkPageStatus ( message , user ) { ..... }

    更新sendNotification函数以显示通知的内容。

     /* title - New message from Open Chat icon - image URL from Flaticon body - main content of the notification */ function sendNotification ( message , user ) { const notification = new Notification ( " New message from Open Chat " , { icon : " https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/733/733585.png " , body : `@ ${ user } : ${ message } ` }) notification . onclick = () => function () { window . open ( " http://localhost:3000/chat " ) } }

    上面的代码片段代表了通知的布局，当点击时，它将用户重定向到http://localhost:3000/chat 。

    恭喜！💃🏻 我们已经能够在用户发送消息时向他们显示桌面通知。 在下一部分中，您将了解如何向离线用户发送警报。

    当他们登录到互联网时，他们将收到通知。

    如何检测用户是否正在查看您的网页

    在本节中，您将学习如何通过JavaScript 页面可见性 API检测聊天页面上的活跃用户。 它允许我们跟踪页面何时最小化、关闭、打开以及用户何时切换到另一个选项卡。

    接下来，让我们使用 API 向离线用户发送通知。

    更新sendNotification函数以仅在用户离线或在另一个选项卡上时发送通知。

     function sendNotification ( message , user ) { document . onvisibilitychange = () => { if ( document . hidden ) { const notification = new Notification ( " New message from Open Chat " , { icon : " https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/733/733585.png " , body : `@ ${ user } : ${ message } ` }) notification . onclick = () => function () { window . open ( " http://localhost:3000/chat " ) } } } }

    从上面的代码片段中， document.onvisibilitychange检测可见性更改，并且document.hidden在发送通知之前检查用户是否在另一个选项卡上或浏览器是否最小化。 您可以在此处了解有关不同状态的更多信息。

    接下来，更新checkPageStatus函数以向除发件人之外的所有用户发送通知。

     export default function checkPageStatus ( message , user ) { if ( user !== localStorage . getItem ( " userName " )) { if ( ! ( " Notification " in window )) { alert ( " This browser does not support system notifications! " ) } else if ( Notification . permission === " granted " ) { sendNotification ( message , user ) } else if ( Notification . permission !== " denied " ) { Notification . requestPermission (( permission ) => { if ( permission === " granted " ) { sendNotification ( message , user ) } }) } } }

    恭喜！🎉您现在可以向离线用户发送通知。

    可选：如何将消息保存到 JSON“数据库”文件

    在本节中，您将学习如何将消息保存在 JSON 文件中 - 为简单起见。 此时可以随意使用您选择的任何实时数据库，如果您有兴趣学习如何将 JSON 文件用作数据库，可以继续阅读。

    在本文的剩余部分，我们将继续引用server/index.js文件。

     //index.js file const express = require ( " express " ) const app = express () const cors = require ( " cors " ) const http = require ( ' http ' ). Server ( app ); const PORT = 4000 const socketIO = require ( ' socket.io ' )( http , { cors : { origin : " http://localhost:3000 " } }); app . use ( cors ()) let users = [] socketIO . on ( ' connection ' , ( socket ) => { console . log ( `⚡: ${ socket . id } user just connected!` ) socket . on ( " message " , data => { console . log ( data ) socketIO . emit ( " messageResponse " , data ) }) socket . on ( " typing " , data => ( socket . broadcast . emit ( " typingResponse " , data ) )) socket . on ( " newUser " , data => { users . push ( data ) socketIO . emit ( " newUserResponse " , users ) }) socket . on ( ' disconnect ' , () => { console . log ( ' 🔥: A user disconnected ' ); users = users . filter ( user => user . socketID !== socket . id ) socketIO . emit ( " newUserResponse " , users ) socket . disconnect () }); }); app . get ( " /api " , ( req , res ) => { res . json ({ message : " Hello " }) }); http . listen ( PORT , () => { console . log ( `Server listening on ${ PORT } ` ); });

    从 JSON 文件中检索消息

    导航到服务器文件夹并创建一个messages.json文件。

     cd server touch messages.json

    通过复制下面的代码向文件添加一些默认消息 - 一个包含默认消息的数组。

     "messages" : [ { "text" : "Hello!" , "name" : "nevodavid" , "id" : "abcd01" }, { "text" : "Welcome to my chat application!💃🏻" , "name" : "nevodavid" , "id" : "defg02" }, { "text" : "You can start chatting!📲" , "name" : "nevodavid" , "id" : "hijk03" } ]
}

    通过将下面的代码片段添加到文件顶部，将messages.json文件导入并读取到server/index.js文件中。

     const fs = require ( ' fs ' ); //Gets the messages.json file and parse the file into JavaScript object const rawData = fs . readFileSync ( ' messages.json ' ); const messagesData = JSON . parse ( rawData );

    通过 API 路由呈现消息。

     //Returns the JSON file app . get ( ' /api ' , ( req , res ) => { res . json ( messagesData ); });

    我们现在可以通过ChatPage组件获取客户端上的消息。 每个用户登录聊天应用程序时都会向他们显示默认消息。

     import React , { useEffect , useState , useRef } from ' react ' import ChatBar from ' ./ChatBar ' import ChatBody from ' ./ChatBody ' import ChatFooter from ' ./ChatFooter ' const ChatPage = ({ socket }) => { const [ messages , setMessages ] = useState ([]) const [ typingStatus , setTypingStatus ] = useState ( "" ) const lastMessageRef = useRef ( null ); /** Previous method via Socket.io */ // useEffect(()=> { // socket.on("messageResponse", data => setMessages([...messages, data])) // }, [socket, messages]) /** Fetching the messages from the API route*/ useEffect (() => { function fetchMessages () { fetch ( " http://localhost:4000/api " ) . then ( response => response . json ()) . then ( data => setMessages ( data . messages )) } fetchMessages () }, []) //....remaining code } export default ChatPage

    将消息保存到 JSON 文件

    在上一节中，我们创建了一个包含默认消息的messages.json文件，并将这些消息显示给用户。

    在这里，我将引导您完成在用户从聊天页面发送消息后自动更新messages.json文件。

    更新服务器上的 Socket.io 消息侦听器以包含以下代码：

     socket . on ( " message " , data => { messagesData [ " messages " ]. push ( data ) const stringData = JSON . stringify ( messagesData , null , 2 ) fs . writeFile ( " messages.json " , stringData , ( err ) => { console . error ( err ) }) socketIO . emit ( " messageResponse " , data ) })

    上面的代码片段在用户发送消息后运行。 它将新数据添加到messages.json文件中的数组中，并重写它以包含最新更新。

    返回聊天页面，发送消息，然后重新加载浏览器。 将显示您的消息。 打开messages.json文件以查看包含新条目的更新文件。

    结论

    在本文中，您学习了如何向用户发送桌面通知、检测用户当前是否在您的页面上处于活动状态以及读取和更新 JSON 文件。 在构建各种应用程序时，可以在不同的情况下使用这些功能。

    这个项目是你可以用Socket.io构建的演示； 您可以通过添加身份验证和连接任何支持实时通信的数据库来改进此应用程序。

    本教程的源代码可在此处获得：
    感谢您的阅读！



原文:

We have all encountered chat over the web, that can be Facebook, Instagram, Whatsapp and the list goes on.
Just to give a bit of context, you send a message to a person or a group, they see the message and reply back. Simple yet complex.

In the previous article in this series, we talked about Socket.io, how you can send messages between a React app client and a Socket.io server, how to get active users in your web application, and how to add the "User is typing..." feature present in most modern chat applications.

In this final article, we'll extend the chat application features. You will learn how to keep your users engaged by sending them desktop notifications when they are not online and how you can read and save the messages in a JSON file. However, this is not a secure way of storing messages in a chat application. Feel free to use any database of your choice when building yours.

How to send desktop messages to users

Here, I'll guide you through sending desktop notifications to offline users when they have new chat messages.

In the previous article, we created the ChatFooter component containing a form with an input field and a send button. Since we will be sending a notification immediately after a user sends a message, this is where the desktop notifications functionality will exist.

Follow the steps below:

Update the ChatFooter.js component to contain a function named checkPageStatus that runs after a message is sent to the Socket.io server. The function accepts the username and the user's message.

import React, {useState} from 'react' const ChatFooter = ({socket}) => { const [message, setMessage] = useState("") const handleTyping = () => socket.emit("typing",`${localStorage.getItem("userName")} is typing`) const handleSendMessage = (e) => { e.preventDefault() if(message.trim() && localStorage.getItem("userName")) { socket.emit("message", { text: message, name: localStorage.getItem("userName"), id: `${socket.id}${Math.random()}` }) //Here it is 👇🏻 checkPageStatus(message, localStorage.getItem("userName")) }} setMessage("") } //Check PageStatus Function const checkPageStatus = () => { } return ( <div className='chat__footer'> <form className='form' onSubmit={handleSendMessage}> <input type="text" placeholder='Write message' className='message' value={message} onChange={e => setMessage(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={handleTyping} /> <button className="sendBtn">SEND</button> </form> </div> )
} export default ChatFooter

Tidy up the ChatFooter component by moving the checkPageStatus function into a src/utils folder. Create a folder named utils.

Create a JavaScript file within the utils folder containing the checkPageStatus function.

cd utils
touch functions.js

Copy the code below into the functions.js file.

export default function checkPageStatus(message, user){ }

Update the ChatFooter component to contain the newly created function from the utils/functions.js file.

import React, {useState} from 'react'
import checkPageStatus from "../utils/functions"
//....Remaining codes

You can now update the function within the functions.js file as done below:

export default function checkPageStatus(message, user) { if(!("Notification" in window)) { alert("This browser does not support system notifications!") } else if(Notification.permission === "granted") { sendNotification(message, user) } else if(Notification.permission !== "denied") { Notification.requestPermission((permission)=> { if (permission === "granted") { sendNotification(message, user) } }) }
}

From the code snippet above, the JavaScript Notification API  is used to configure and display notifications to users. It has three properties representing its current state. They are:

  • Denied - notifications are not allowed.
  • Granted - notifications are allowed.
  • Default - The user choice is unknown, so the browser will act as if notifications are disabled. (We are not interested in this)

The first conditional statement (if) checks if the JavaScript Notification API is unavailable on the web browser, then alerts the user that the browser does not support desktop notifications.

The second conditional statement checks if notifications are allowed, then calls the sendNotification function.

The last conditional statement checks if the notifications are not disabled, it then requests the permission status before sending the notifications.

Next, create the sendNotification function referenced in the code snippet above.

//utils/functions.js
function sendNotification(message, user) { }
export default function checkPageStatus(message, user) { .....
}

Update the sendNotification function to display the notification's content.

/*
title - New message from Open Chat
icon - image URL from Flaticon
body - main content of the notification
*/
function sendNotification(message, user) { const notification = new Notification("New message from Open Chat", { icon: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/733/733585.png", body: `@${user}: ${message}` }) notification.onclick = ()=> function() { window.open("http://localhost:3000/chat") }
}

The code snippet above represents the layout of the notification, and when clicked, it redirects the user to http://localhost:3000/chat.

Congratulations!💃🏻 We've been able to display desktop notifications to the user when they send a message. In the next section, you'll learn how to send alerts to offline users.

💡 Offline users are users not currently viewing the webpage or connected to the internet. When they log on to the internet, they will receive notifications.

How to detect if a user is viewing your web page

In this section, you'll learn how to detect active users on the chat page via the  JavaScript Page visibility API. It allows us to track when a page is minimized, closed, open, and when a user switches to another tab.

Next, let's use the API to send notifications to offline users.

Update the sendNotification function to send the notification only when users are offline or on another tab.

function sendNotification(message, user) { document.onvisibilitychange = ()=> { if(document.hidden) { const notification = new Notification("New message from Open Chat", { icon: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/733/733585.png", body: `@${user}: ${message}` }) notification.onclick = ()=> function() { window.open("http://localhost:3000/chat") } } } }

From the code snippet above, document.onvisibilitychange detects visibility changes, and document.hidden checks if the user is on another tab or the browser is minimised before sending the notification. You can learn more about the different states here.

Next, update the checkPageStatus function to send notifications to all the users except the sender.

export default function checkPageStatus(message, user) { if(user !== localStorage.getItem("userName")) { if(!("Notification" in window)) { alert("This browser does not support system notifications!") } else if(Notification.permission === "granted") { sendNotification(message, user) }else if(Notification.permission !== "denied") { Notification.requestPermission((permission)=> { if (permission === "granted") { sendNotification(message, user) } }) } } }

Congratulations!🎉 You can now send notifications to offline users.

Optional: How to save the messages to a JSON "database" file

In this section, you'll learn how to save the messages in a JSON file - for simplicity. Feel free to use any real-time database of your choice at this point, and you can continue reading if you are interested in learning how to use a JSON file as a database.

We'll keep referencing the server/index.js file for the remaining part of this article.

//index.js file
const express = require("express")
const app = express()
const cors = require("cors")
const http = require('http').Server(app);
const PORT = 4000
const socketIO = require('socket.io')(http, { cors: { origin: "http://localhost:3000" }
}); app.use(cors())
let users = [] socketIO.on('connection', (socket) => { console.log(`⚡: ${socket.id} user just connected!`) socket.on("message", data => { console.log(data) socketIO.emit("messageResponse", data) }) socket.on("typing", data => ( socket.broadcast.emit("typingResponse", data) )) socket.on("newUser", data => { users.push(data) socketIO.emit("newUserResponse", users) }) socket.on('disconnect', () => { console.log('🔥: A user disconnected'); users = users.filter(user => user.socketID !== socket.id) socketIO.emit("newUserResponse", users) socket.disconnect() });
}); app.get("/api", (req, res) => { res.json({message: "Hello"})
}); http.listen(PORT, () => { console.log(`Server listening on ${PORT}`);
});

Retrieving messages from the JSON file

Navigate into the server folder and create a messages.json file.

cd server
touch messages.json

Add some default messages to the file by copying the code below – an array containing default messages.

"messages": [ { "text": "Hello!", "name": "nevodavid", "id": "abcd01" }, { "text": "Welcome to my chat application!💃🏻", "name": "nevodavid", "id": "defg02" }, { "text": "You can start chatting!📲", "name": "nevodavid", "id": "hijk03" } ]
}

Import and read the messages.json file into the server/index.js file by adding the code snippet below to the top of the file.

const fs = require('fs');
//Gets the messages.json file and parse the file into JavaScript object
const rawData = fs.readFileSync('messages.json');
const messagesData = JSON.parse(rawData);

Render the messages via the API route.

//Returns the JSON file
app.get('/api', (req, res) => { res.json(messagesData);
});

We can now fetch the messages on the client via the ChatPage component. The default messages are shown to every user when they sign in to the chat application.

import React, { useEffect, useState, useRef} from 'react'
import ChatBar from './ChatBar'
import ChatBody from './ChatBody'
import ChatFooter from './ChatFooter' const ChatPage = ({socket}) => { const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]) const [typingStatus, setTypingStatus] = useState("") const lastMessageRef = useRef(null); /** Previous method via Socket.io */ // useEffect(()=> { // socket.on("messageResponse", data => setMessages([...messages, data])) // }, [socket, messages]) /** Fetching the messages from the API route*/ useEffect(()=> { function fetchMessages() { fetch("http://localhost:4000/api") .then(response => response.json()) .then(data => setMessages(data.messages)) } fetchMessages() }, []) //....remaining code
} export default ChatPage

Saving messages to the JSON file

In the previous section, we created a messages.json file containing default messages and displayed the messages to the users.

Here, I'll walk you through updating the messages.json file automatically after a user sends a message from the chat page.

Update the Socket.io message listener on the server to contain the code below:

socket.on("message", data => { messagesData["messages"].push(data) const stringData = JSON.stringify(messagesData, null, 2) fs.writeFile("messages.json", stringData, (err)=> { console.error(err) }) socketIO.emit("messageResponse", data)
})

The code snippet above runs after a user sends a message. It adds the new data to the array in the messages.json file and rewrites it to contain the latest update.

Head back to the chat page, send a message, then reload the browser. Your message will be displayed. Open the messages.json file to view the updated file with the new entry.

Conclusion

In this article, you've learnt how to send desktop notifications to users, detect if a user is currently active on your page, and read and update a JSON file. These features can be used in different cases when building various applications.

This project is a demo of what you can build with Socket.io; you can improve this application by adding authentication and connecting any database that supports real-time communication.

The source code for this tutorial is available here:
https://github.com/novuhq/blog/tree/main/build-a-chat-app-part-two

Thank you for reading!

Items.Title: 音乐星期一——你在听什么？ (August 22) （8月22日） | Music Monday — What are you listening to? (August 22)
Items.Description:
一旦暂停，音乐讨论将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，音乐讨论将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，所有音乐讨论的帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果音乐讨论没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记音乐讨论：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记音乐讨论将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, music-discussions will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, music-discussions will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by music-discussions will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If music-discussions is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag music-discussions:

music-discussions consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging music-discussions will restore default visibility to their posts.

Items.Title: 第一个集成的开源 API 安全测试工具 CI/CD。 | The first Open-Sourced API security testing tool CI/CD integrated.
Items.Description:
你好社区！ 期待听到您的想法并获得您对此的反馈。 今天我们发布了 Cherrybomb v0.7 ，我想告诉你所有的新功能，以及我们拥有的新集成。

什么是樱桃炸弹？ 它是如何工作的？

它易于使用，并与这些工具集成以提供完整的 API 安全测试解决方案。

  • 主动检查

    活动模块将我们的 API 测试提升到一个新的水平。 不仅提供 OAS 文件的静态测试和审计（使用被动模块），还提供通过发送请求和分析响应来测试 API 本身的测试。 被动检查


还有 Endpoint 和 Parameter 表，它们使用不同的键对整个 API 进行分类和清点。

为什么要使用它？

通过使用 API 安全测试，您还可以确保您的 API 符合行业标准和最佳实践。

我该如何开始？

您可以通过两种方式使用 Cherrybomb：

Hello Community! Looking forward to hear your thoughts and get your feedback about this. 🙏

Today we released v0.7 of Cherrybomb and I want to tell you about all the new features, and the new integrations we have.

What is Cherrybomb? And how does it work?

CherryBomb is our opensource tool that validate your OpenAPI specification, it is designed for use with popular CI/CD tools such as Jenkins and Travis CI.
It is easy to use, and it integrates with these tools to provide a complete API security testing solution.

  • Active Check

    The active module takes our API testing to a new level. By providing not only static testing and auditing of your OAS file (with the passive module), but a test that tests the API itself by sending requests and analyzing the responses. The Active module tests APIs by verifying that the API follows the specifications dictated in the OAS file and by testing the API for common security vulnerabilities.

  • Passive Check


Cherrybomb reads your API spec file (Open API Specification) and validates it for best practices and discovers common API design flaws.

There are also the Endpoint and Parameter tables, which sort out and inventory your entire API, using different keys.

Why use it?

API Security Testing can save you time and money by helping you to find and fix vulnerabilities in your code before they are exploited, I wrote an article about it.
By using API Security Testing, you can also ensure that your API is compliant with industry standards and best practices.

How do I get started?

There are two ways you can use Cherrybomb:

  • You can embed it into your CI pipeline, and If you plan on doing that I would recommend that you go to our website, sign up, go through the CI pipeline integration builder, and copy the groovy/GitHub actions snippet built for you. Example:

  • You can download it for some tryouts and testing using curl: 
curl https://cherrybomb.blstsecurity.com/install    | /bin/bash && cherrybomb oas -f "home/Documents/file_openapi.json"

What this means for the future of API development?

This is a good thing, as it will help to raise the level of security for all APIs. In the longer term, we can expect to see more APIs being developed with security builtin from the start. This will help to ensure that APIs are more secure, and will help to protect the data and systems that they interact with.

So I hope that you enjoy to read my article, if you have ideas or question, feel free to ask in the comments :)

💪 We are looking for contributors for Cherrybomb, together we can make API security easier and affordable for everyone.

If you're looking for a new open-sourced API security testing tool for CI/CD, look no further! We've got just the thing.
Star Cherrybomb and if you have questions or ideas Join our Discord server.

Items.Title: 我用来将我的网站增长到每月 20k+ 访问者的 SEO 工具 | SEO tools I used to grow my sites to 20k+ visitors/month
Items.Description:
无论您是在开发自己的博客、新闻网站还是构建产品，您都必须关心您网站的 SEO。 如果您的网站未针对搜索引擎进行优化，则更难找到，从而导致访问者和潜在客户减少。 这些是我用来监控和提高网站性能的工具。 也可以帮助您构建一个更易于查找和使用的站点。

您只需要花一点时间在线研究 SEO，然后ahrefs就会出现在您的结果中。 除了他们令人难以置信的博客和关于搜索如何在网络上工作的研究之外，他们还提供了一套很棒的免费工具来监控和改进您网站上的 SEO。

我发现ahrefs 网站管理员工具在密切关注我的网站内容方面绝对是无价的。 一旦您注册了免费帐户并确认您可以控制要监控的网站，ahrefs 就会开始每周对您域中的所有页面进行审核。 它将检查常见的陷阱，并为您的网站提供 0-100 的健康评分。 如果您是开发人员，将其视为 SEO 的短绒线可能会有所帮助。

我用它来查找和修复我的网站的无数问题，从断开的链接到丢失的规范 URL，删除不必要的重定向以及寻找将现有文章相互链接的机会。

您将通过电子邮件收到每周审计报告，当事情发生变化时，您会知道该报告 - 这在您无法控制的事情最终影响您的网站的情况下会很有帮助。 曾经有人删除了您链接到的文章吗？ 谷歌搜索控制台

我对Google Search Console的采用源于我在 Monica Lent 的Blogging for Devs课程中学到的知识。

请注意，它不会像 Google Analytics 和 Fathom 那样跟踪您网站上的用户——只会跟踪您在搜索中的表现。 这是您网站的有机增长和权威的有用试金石。 如果您正在投资分享您的专业知识并建立一个可搜索的网站，那么您在 Google Search Console 上的表现应该会随着时间的推移而增长。 换句话说，您可以看到您是否通过 SEO 获得了吸引力。

要开始使用，您需要在 Google Search Console 中注册您的网站。 验证您的所有权需要几个快速步骤，并且不需要您添加 Google Analytics（如果您像我一样选择Fathom的隐私优先功能，这将很有帮助）。

最重要的是，它是免费的！ 只需注册并按照说明添加 DNS 记录，或将文件上传到特定位置，以验证您是否拥有您有兴趣监控的站点。 您应该确保在您的网站上有一个站点地图——它们很容易生成，并且值得花时间来做对。 这是 Google 的抓取工具主要用来为您的文章编入搜索结果的索引。

我使用 Search Console 来决定接下来要写的内容，并随着时间的推移跟踪我的网站的进度。 目前，Google 会保留您网站 16 个月的流量历史记录供您分析，但该历史记录会在您使用 Search Console 注册您的网站后开始。 所以，越早设置越好！

深探分析

根据他们的网站， Fathom 是一种谷歌分析替代方案，不会损害访问者的数据隐私。 我们通过使网站分析易于使用并尊重隐私法（如 GDPR 等），彻底改变了网站分析。

如果您从未关注过您的网络资产的分析，Fathom 将是一个启示 - 了解您网站上的哪些页面正在获得流量、流量来自哪里以及一天中什么时间最多，这非常有用忙碌的。

如果您过去使用过 Google Analytics，您可能会惊讶于使用优先分析的分析工具是多么自由。 你真的不需要知道谁在给定页面上——相反，关注你网站上正在访问的内容，以及读者为到达那里所采取的旅程，这是一个超级有用的工具，当你在研究和写新文章。

这很棒，并且将读者的隐私放在首位。 由于新法规以及浏览器和操作系统中内置的隐私工具，谷歌的优势正在迅速消失。 我之前写过一些关于我使用 Fathom 的经历。 您可能想查看我的其他文章，包括：为什么我切换到 Fathom for Analytics以及如何将 Fathom Analytics 添加到您的 Remix.run 应用程序

免费自托管 Fathom - Fathom Lite

如果您对购买 Fathom 犹豫不决，他们还提供了一个名为Fathom Lite的开源版本 - 您需要自己配置和托管它，但它应该让您了解 Fathom 的高级服务是什么样的。

如果您有兴趣尝试 Fathom 的付费服务，请使用我的推荐链接获得折扣以帮助您入门。

我使用Cloudflare来管理我所有站点的 DNS 记录。 除了具有非常简单的 DNS 管理 UI 之外，它们还提供了许多其他功能来保持您的站点运行良好。 这包括对 DDoS 攻击、维护模式和性能增强（例如源服务器优化和缓存）的自动保护。

您需要设置一个帐户，查找将域添加到 Cloudflare 帐户的说明，然后根据需要更新您的 DNS 设置。

因为我拥有来自各种注册商的域，所以能够在一个地方为所有注册商管理 DNS 真是太好了。 他们还提供了大量其他出色的开发工具，例如Cloudflare Workers ，您可以使用这些工具为您的网站添加交互性。

它完全免费，只需片刻即可设置 - 您只需创建一个帐户，并设置关键字以供服务跟踪。 当您的关键字在Reddit 、 Hackernews或Lobste.rs上被提及时，您会在收件箱中收到一封整洁的小电子邮件。


这就是来自 f5bot 的典型通知的样子。

通知来得非常快——根据我的经验，我的网站在网上被提及后几分钟内就会收到通知。 这非常有用，因为它可以让您快速响应、发起对话并与共享您的工作的人建立联系。 这些联系是建立一个伟大的在线个人品牌的支柱。

您可以设置任何您想要的搜索关键字，因此如果您希望关注竞争对手或主题，那也很好。

总的来说，我强烈推荐f5bot - 这是一个非常有用的工具，它是免费的，而且设置起来再简单不过了。

原文:

Whether you're working on your own blog, a news site, building a product, you absolutely must care about your site's SEO. If your site is not optimized for search engines, it is harder to find, leading to fewer visitors and potential customers. SEO tools can help you improve the usability of your site, making it easier for users to find the information they are looking for.

These are the tools that I use to monitor and enhance my sites' performance. The can help you build a site that is easier to find and use, too.

ahrefs webmaster tools

You only need to spend a few moments researching SEO online before ahrefs pops up somewhere in your results. In addition to their incredible blog and studies on how search works on the web, they provide a fantastic suite of free tools for monitoring and improviing the SEO on your sites.

There's always room to improve SEO, and ahrefs webmaster tools makes it easy to digest

I have found ahrefs webmaster tools to be absolutely invaluable in keeping an eye on my sites' content. Once you register a free account and verify that you have control of the sites you want to monitor, ahrefs will kick off a weekly audit of all the pages on your domain. It will check for common pitfalls, and give your site a health score from 0-100. If you're a dev, it may be helpful to think of it as a linter for SEO.

I've used it to find and fix countless problems with my sites, from broken links to missing Canonical URLs, removing unnecessary redirects and finding opportunities to link existing articles to one another.

You will get weekly audit reports in email, which let you know when things change - this can be helpful in situations where things out of your control end up affecting your site. Ever had someone take down an article that you link to? Ahrefs will find it.

Google Search Console

My adoption of Google Search Console come from what I learned taking Monica Lent's Blogging for Devs course.

Google Search Console gives you reports on how and when people see your site pop up in Google Search results. Note that it won't track people on your site like Google Analytics and Fathom do - just your performance in search. This is a useful litmus for your site's organic growth and authority. If you're investing in sharing your expertise and building a searchable site, your performance on Google Search Console should grow over time. In other words, you can see whether you're gaining traction via SEO or not.

To get started, you'll need to register your site with the Google Search Console. Verifying your ownership takes a few quick steps, and doesn't require you to add Google Analytics (which is helpful if, like me, you've chosen Fathom for its privacy-first features).

Best of all, it's free! Just register and follow instructions to add a DNS record, or upload a file to a specific place to verify that you own the site you're interested in monitoring. You should make sure to have a sitemap on your site - they're easy to generate, and worth the time to get right. This is what Google's crawlers primarily use to index your articles for search results.

I use the Search Console to make decisions about things to write about next, and track the progress of my site over time. At the moment, Google will keeps 16 months of your site's traffic history around for you to analyze, but that history starts once you've registered you site with the Search Console. So, the sooner you get set up, the better!

Fathom Analytics

Fathom is privacy first analytics for the web. According to their site, Fathom is a Google Analytics alternative that doesn’t compromise visitor privacy for data. We revolutionized website analytics by making them easy to use and respectful of privacy laws (like GDPR and more).

If you've never paid attention analytics for your web properties, Fathom will be a revelation - it's super useful to have an understanding of which pages on your site are getting traffic, where that traffic is coming from, and what times of day are most busy.

If you've used Google Analytics in the past, you may be surprised just how freeing it is to use an analytics tool that prioritizes analytics. You really don't need to know who is on a given page - instead, focusing on the content on your site which is being visited, and the journey readers take to get there is a super useful tool to have when you're researching and writing new articles.

It's great, and puts your readers' privacy first. Google's advantage is quickly vanishing due to new regulations, and privacy tools that are being built into browsers and operating systems. Fathom does a great job of providing value without fishing for every minute detail about your readers.

Fathom is lightweight and ridiculously easy to use. The Fathom team provides docs for a variety of platforms and JAMstack site builders, including Gatsby, ConvertKit, Next.js, Vue, Webflow, Wordpress, and quite a few more.

I've written a bit about my experiences with Fathom before. You may want to check out my other articles, including: Why I switched to Fathom for Analytics and How to add Fathom Analytics to your Remix.run app

Self-host Fathom for free - Fathom Lite

If you're hesitant to pay for Fathom, they do also provide an open source version called Fathom Lite - you'll need to configure and host it yourself, but it should give you an idea of what Fathom's premiums service is like.

If you're interested in trying out Fathom's paid service, use my referral link for a discount to get you started.

Cloudflare

I use Cloudflare to manage the DNS records for all of my sites. In addition to having a really straightforward UI for DNS management, they offer a host of other features to keep your sites running well. This includes automated protection for DDoS attacks, maintenance mode, and performance enhancements such as origin server optimization and caching.

Cloudflare provides a Free Tier that will work for most personal sites. You'll need to set up an account, look for the instructions to add your domain to your Cloudflare account, and then update your DNS settings as needed.

Because I own domains from a variety of registrars, it's really nice to be able to manage DNS for all of them in one place. They also provide a ton of other great dev tools, like Cloudflare Workers, which you can use to add interactivity to your site.

F5Bot


F5bot is free, and dead simple to set up.

The pitch for f5bot is simple - as they say, it is a service that will help you to "Get an email when you're mentioned online!".

It's completely free, and takes just moments to set up - you just need to create an account, and set up keywords for the service to track. When your keywords are mentioned on Reddit, Hackernews, or Lobste.rs, you'll get a tidy little email in your inbox.


This is what typical notification from f5bot looks like.

Notifications come very quickly - in my experience, I see them within minutes of my sites being mentioned online. This is hugely helpful because it allows you to respond quickly, strike up a conversation, and make a connection with the people who are sharing your work. Those connections are the backbone of building a great personal brand online.

You can set up any search keyword you want, so if there's a competitor or topic that you're hoping to keep an eye on, it's great for that, too.

Overall, I highly recommend f5bot - it's an incredibly useful tool, it's free, and it couldn't be easier to set up.

The window object is supported by most modern browsers. It represents the browser window. The window is the root object and every other javascript object, function, variables are members of it.

It has some properties and methods. Here, we are going to see about window.open which we mostly use when we want to open a new window to perform some action.

Window.open() - open a new window and returns the windowProxy object which is the wrapper on the window object.

Syntax:

window.open(?url, ?target, ?features) - all three params are optional.

url - url to navigate for.

target - window name - it opens a new window if a window with that name doesn't exist otherwise simply focus the existing and reloads.

features - browser features like width, height etc.

// -> Opens up a pop-up with the mentioned URL with name JS_Articles (Its not a browser title)

const windowObj = window.open('https://dev.to/urstrulyvishwak', 'JS_Articles', 'popup');

// -> Focus window - if the 'JS_Articles' window is behind the current browser then it will get focused.

windowObj.focus();

// -> blur window - out focus the window as opposed to focusing.

windowObj.blur();

// -> Count of windows opened in current window starting with index 0.

windowObj.length;

// -> close - to close the window

windowObj.close();

// -> closed - it returns boolean and tells whether the window has opened or closed.
windowObj.closed;

Using these properties we can completely deal with a new window that we opened.

Items.Title: 介绍主题重做 - 现代 WordPress 入门主题 | Introducing Theme Redone - the modern WordPress Starter Theme
Items.Description:
尼古拉·伊万诺夫

发表于这一年是 2022 年。我们有大量的 WordPress 入门主题，旨在为创建自定义 WordPress 网站打下坚实的基础并加快我们的开发过程。 面向古腾堡的 WORDPRESS 框架

自 2020 年以来，我们一直在开发该框架，经过 2 年多的时间，以及大量的润色和文档编写，Theme Redone 终于成型并开源了它。

它是以标准化方式构建面向 Gutenberg 块的网站的坚实起点。

我们并没有仅仅停留在这个主题上。 我们花了两个多月的时间详细记录所有内容，并编写了 57 页以上的可靠文档。

在此过程中，我们完善了主题，并尝试自动化并涵盖尽可能多的重复任务。 我们还创建了一个TRB CLI ，它可以加快 Gutenberg Blocks 的创建和重构过程。

面向 MVC 的方法将视图与逻辑分离

我们从 Laravel 和其他类似项目中汲取灵感，这些项目真正巧妙地处理了编码的这一方面，并​​使组织和推理代码变得轻而易举。

在 Laravel 中，我们会为逻辑编写普通的旧 PHP，然后我们会为视图层使用 Blade 模板，我们还有模型、视图和控制器文件来分离关注点并逻辑高效地组织代码。 我们采用了相同的方法，但是是在 WordPress 环境的上下文中。 从概念上讲，我们组织代码的方式类似于 Laravel，但有一些不同......

在我们的介绍性帖子中阅读更多内容或查看Theme Redone 文档。

谢谢阅读！

原文:

Nikola Ivanov

Posted on Aug 22

The year is 2022. We have plenty of WordPress starter themes aimed at creating a solid foundation and speeding up our development process for creating custom WordPress websites. WordPress Gutenberg editor has taken over the old classic editor and now we are building more sophisticated WordPress websites via blocks.

Theme Redone is the new theme starter on the block that focuses on the new WordPress concepts, Gutenberg blocks, and much more.

GUTENBERG-ORIENTED WORDPRESS FRAMEWORK

We've been developing the framework since 2020, and after more than 2 years, and a lot of polishing and documentation writing, Theme Redone finally took its form and we open-sourced it.

It is a solid starter for building Gutenberg blocks oriented websites in a standardized way.

We haven’t stopped at the theme on its own; We’ve spent more than a couple of months documenting everything in detail and writing solid documentation 57+ pages long.

Along the way, we’ve polished the theme and tried to automate and cover as many repeating tasks as possible. We’ve also created a TRB CLI, which speeds up the Gutenberg Blocks creation and refactoring process.

MVC-ORIENTED APPROACH TO SEPARATE THE VIEW FROM THE LOGIC

We’ve taken the inspiration from Laravel and other similar projects that really approached this aspect of coding cleverly and made it a breeze to organize and reason about the code.

In Laravel, we would write plain old PHP for the logic, and then we would use Blade templates for the View layer, we also have model, view, and controller files to separate the concerns and organize code logically and efficiently. We have adopted that same approach but in the context of the WordPress environment. Conceptually, the way we organize code is similar to Laravel, but with a few differences...

Read more in our introductory post or check out the Theme Redone docs.

Thanks for reading!

Items.Title: 使用 SSL、Nginx、PM2 在单个服务器上部署多个 NodeJS 应用程序 - 第 2 部分 | Deploy Multiple NodeJS Apps on single Server with SSL, Nginx, PM2 - Part 2
Items.Description:
兰詹·辛格

发表于请在此处阅读本系列的第 1 部分。

我们已经为第一个 APP 设置了 NGINX、PM2 和 SSL，我们将设置一个新的 NodeJS APP。
我们需要做很少的步骤来启动和运行新应用程序

步骤 08 - 克隆新项目或使用文件创建新项目

这与步骤 02 非常相似，我们只是要创建一个新文件夹并创建新应用程序并在不同的端口号上运行它。

现在只需创建一个名为 index.js 的新文件

现在在 index.js 中粘贴以下代码

const http = require ( ' http ' ); const hostname = ' localhost ' ; const port = 4000 ; //make sure this port no is different from the first one const server = http . createServer (( req , res ) => { res . statusCode = 200 ; res . setHeader ( ' Content-Type ' , ' text/plain ' ); res . end ( ' Hello Everyone from APP 2 ! \n ' ); }); server . listen ( port , hostname , () => { console . log ( `Server running at http:// ${ hostname } : ${ port } /` ); });

步骤 09 - 使用 PM2 启动应用程序

我们将使用 PM2 启动应用程序并给它一个可选的名称

pm2 start index.js --name "APP 2"

这将在端口号 4000 启动应用程序，我们还可以通过以下操作查看所有正在使用 PM2 运行的应用程序

这将为您提供所有正在运行的应用程序的列表，您也可以使用 id 或 Name 启动/停止/重新启动。

第 10 步 - 使用 NGINX 添加反向代理

我们还需要为这个应用再添加一次服务器配置。 更新服务器首先打开配置

 sudo nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/default

并将这个新块添加到服务器块的位置部分

 server_name yourdomain2.com www.yourdomain2.com; location / { proxy_pass http://localhost:4000; proxy_http_version 1.1; proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade; proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade'; proxy_set_header Host $host; proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade; }

如果您打算在子域上托管第二个应用程序，只需将yourdomain2.com替换为api2.yourdomain.com类的子域

然后检查并重新启动 NGINX

 # Check NGINX config sudo nginx -t # Restart NGINX sudo service nginx restart

如果指向域，您应该会在端口 80 上看到您的应用程序，还有一个步骤可以添加 SSL。

第 11 步 - 为第二个 APP 添加 SSL

我们已经安装了 certbot，因此添加其他域不是问题

sudo certbot --nginx -d yourdomain2.com -d www.yourdomain2.com

或子域

sudo certbot --nginx -d api2.yourdomain.com

这就是您的所有新应用程序也应该是使用 SSL 的新域上的 Live。

感谢您阅读干杯。

原文:

Ranjan Singh

Posted on Aug 22

Please Read Part 1 of the series here.

We have already setup NGINX, PM2 and SSL for the First APP and we are going to setup a new NodeJS APP.
There is very few steps we need to do to get the new app up and running

Step 08 - Clone New Project Or Create New with file

It's quite similar to the step 02 we are just going to create a new folder and create new app and run it on different Port No.

now just create a new file called index.js

now paste following code in index.js

const http = require('http'); const hostname = 'localhost';
const port = 4000; //make sure this port no is different from the first one const server = http.createServer((req, res) => { res.statusCode = 200; res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/plain'); res.end('Hello Everyone from APP 2 !\n');
}); server.listen(port, hostname, () => { console.log(`Server running at http://${hostname}:${port}/`);
});

Step 09 - Start the App With PM2

we are going start the app with PM2 and give it a Name that is optional

pm2 start index.js --name "APP 2"

this will start the app at port no 4000 we can also see all running app with PM2 by following

this will give you list of all running apps you can start/stop/restart using id or Name aswell.

Step 10 - Adding Reverse Proxy with NGINX

we need to add server config one more time for this app aswell. To update server First open the config

sudo nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/default

and add this new block in location part of the server block

    server_name yourdomain2.com www.yourdomain2.com;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://localhost:4000; 
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
    }

if you are planing to host secound app on subdomain just replace yourdomain2.com with subdomain like api2.yourdomain.com

then check and restart the NGINX

# Check NGINX config
sudo nginx -t

# Restart NGINX
sudo service nginx restart

if domain is pointed you should see your app live on port 80 there is one more step to go adding SSL.

Step 11 - Adding SSL for Second APP

we already have certbot installed so adding additional domains are not an issue

sudo certbot --nginx -d yourdomain2.com -d www.yourdomain2.com

or for Subdomain

sudo certbot --nginx -d api2.yourdomain.com

that's all your New app also should be Live on New domain with SSL.

Thanks for reading Cheers.

Items.Title: 在 30 分钟内构建 Google Cloud Storage (GCS) 文件浏览器应用 | Building a Google Cloud Storage (GCS) file explorer app in 30 minutes
Items.Description:
在本教程中，我们将构建一个内部工具，用于读取、下载和上传文件到 Google Cloud Storage 中的存储桶。

对象存储在与项目关联的存储桶中，这些存储桶按组织分组。

构建 GCS 文件资源管理器需要什么？

  • 您可以在ToolJet Cloud上创建一个免费帐户或在本地计算机上运行它。
  • 奖励：从此处下载导出的应用程序并将其导入您的 ToolJet 帐户以立即使用它。

    这是应用程序的一瞥：

    事不宜迟，让我们开始构建应用程序。

    构建 GCS 文件浏览器的 UI

    让我们从为 Explorer 构建 UI 开始。 登录到 ToolJet，然后在Dashboard上，单击Create new application按钮以创建一个新应用程序。 创建应用程序后，您将被重定向到可视化应用程序编辑器。 您可以通过编辑默认名称来更改应用程序的名称，即应用程序构建器左上角的未命名应用程序。

    可视化应用编辑器有 4 个部分：

    • 画布在中心，您可以在其中拖放小部件来构建 UI。
    • 底部的查询编辑器，您可以在其中创建查询。
    • 在右侧边栏中，您会找到具有内置小部件和组件列表的小部件管理器。 您可以拖放以开始构建用户界面。
    • 在左侧边栏中，您将看到 Inspector、调试器、注释、设置和数据源管理器。 数据源管理器用于添加新的数据源或管理已连接的数据源。

    让我们构建 UI

    为了构建用户界面，您需要从小部件管理器（右侧栏）拖放以下组件并相应地放置它们。

    这是我用于构建 UI 的小部件的配置：

    • 一个容器作为标题和容器内的文本小部件，为应用程序提供标题，即GCS 文件资源管理器

    • 标题下方的另一个容器将包含应用程序的所有部分。 给这个容器一个您从样式中选择的背景颜色。

    • 让我们在中心添加一个文本小部件并将文本设置为请选择一个存储桶- 我们将通过有条件地禁用我们将在此文本小部件顶部添加的容器的可见性来显示此文本。

    • 让我们在文本小部件顶部拖动一个容器，并将列表视图小部件放入容器中。 您还可以使用文本小部件来设置列名称 -名称、更新时间、大小和操作。

    • 在列表视图小部件中，使用文本小部件作为名称、更新时间和大小。 将图像小部件用于操作。 用户将单击下载图像以从 GCS 下载对象。

    • 将三个文本小部件名称、更新时间和大小的以下字段值设置为{{listItem.name}} 、 {{moment(listItem).format("DD/MM/YYYY h:mm:ss a")}}和{{(listItem.size/1024).toFixed(2)}} kb。 在图像小部件中将加载状态值设置为{{listItem.id === variables.currentlyLoadingId}} ，并添加事件处理程序以打开网页{{queries.urlfordownload.data.url}}

    • 在容器右侧拖动一个按钮，该按钮将用于触发选择存储桶的对话框。

    • 将模态框拖到容器下方的某处，转到按钮属性并设置事件处理程序以显示您添加的模态框。

    • 单击按钮以显示模态，然后您可以在模态内部拖放下拉列表和按钮小部件以构建模态 UI。 下拉列表将包括我们将从查询中检索的存储桶列表，并且该按钮将具有一个事件处理程序来触发查询以列出所选存储桶中的文件。

    • 让我们在按钮旁边添加文本小部件，以显示当前选择的存储桶。 将文本值设置为{{components.dropdown1.value}}

    • 现在，UI 的最后一部分 -上传部分。 我们将在容器内构建此部分。 我们将使用文本、分隔符、文本输入、文件选择器和按钮小部件来构建该部分。 按钮小部件将包含一个事件处理程序，用于触发我们稍后将创建的上传查询。

    现在，我们已经完成了 UI 的构建——让我们继续连接 Google Cloud Storage 并构建查询。

    连接 GCS 数据源并创建查询

    在创建查询之前，让我们先连接 GCS 数据源：

    • 转到左侧边栏的数据源管理器，然后单击+按钮添加新数据源。
    • 搜索并点击Google Cloud Storage 。
    • 输入并保存服务帐号的 JSON 私钥
    • 您可以单击“测试连接”按钮检查连接，然后单击“保存”按钮保存数据源。
    • 现在，我们可以开始创建查询了。

    对于此应用程序，我们将需要构建以下查询：

    • 用于触发显示模式操作的 JavaScript 代码
    • 列出来自 GCS 的存储桶
    • 列出所选存储桶中的对象/文件
    • 将文件上传到选定的存储桶
    • 创建用于从存储桶下载文件的签名 URL

    用于触发显示模式操作的 JavaScript 代码

    • 转到查询面板，然后单击+按钮创建一个新的JavaScript 代码查询并输入以下代码以触发显示模式操作：
     actions . showModal ( ' modal1 ' )

    • 转到高级选项卡，打开在页面加载时运行查询？ 选项，并将查询保存为showModalOnPageLoad 。 启用在页面加载时运行查询选项将在每次加载应用程序时显示模式 - 让用户在移动到其他应用程序功能之前可以灵活地选择存储桶。

    列出来自 GCS 的存储桶

    • 转到查询面板，然后单击+按钮创建一个新查询
    • 选择Google Cloud Storage作为数据源
    • 在操作下拉列表中，选择列出存储桶选项

    • 转到高级选项卡，打开在页面加载时运行查询？ 选项，然后单击保存并运行按钮。
    • 让我们通过单击更改按钮打开模态框，然后编辑模态框内的下拉菜单的属性。 将选项值和选项标签设置为{{queries.listBuckets.data.buckets}} ，默认值为{{queries.listBuckets.data.buckets[0]}} ，选项加载状态为{{queries.listBuckets.isLoading}}

    列出所选存储桶中的对象/文件

    • 转到查询面板，然后单击+按钮创建一个新查询
    • 选择 Google Cloud Storage 作为数据源
    • 在操作下拉列表中，选择List files in a bucket选项
    • 在Bucket字段中，使用 JS 从下拉小部件中的选定选项中动态获取值 - {{components.dropdown1.value}}

    • 现在，转到高级选项卡并添加一个事件处理程序以在查询成功后关闭模式。
    • 将查询保存并运行为listFiles

    • 让我们通过单击更改按钮打开模态，然后编辑模态内部按钮的属性。 添加一个事件处理程序，用于对On Click事件运行listFiles查询。

    • 转到列表视图小部件并连接查询返回的数据。 将列表数据字段值设置为{{queries.listFiles.data.files}}

    将文件上传到选定的存储桶

    • 转到查询面板，然后单击+按钮创建一个新查询
    • 选择Google Cloud Storage作为数据源
    • 在操作下拉列表中，选择上传文件选项
    • 在Bucket字段输入{{components.dropdown1.value}} ， File name字段输入{{components.textinput1.value}} ， Content type 字段输入{{components.filepicker1.file[0].type}} ，上传数据字段输入{{components.filepicker1.file[0].content}} ，并将编码设置为utf8

    • 转到“高级”选项卡并添加两个事件处理程序，其中一个用于对On Success事件运行listFiles查询。 这将重新加载列表视图小部件中的文件列表。

    • 另一个事件处理程序为文件选择器设置组件特定的操作，一旦查询成功，它将从小部件中清除文件。

    • 将查询保存并运行为upload 。

    创建用于从存储桶下载文件的签名 URL

    • 转到查询面板，然后单击+按钮创建一个新查询
    • 选择Google Cloud Storage作为数据源
    • 在操作下拉列表中，选择Signed URL for download选项
    • 在Bucket字段中输入{{components.dropdown1.value}} ，在File name字段中输入{{queries.listFiles.data.files[components.listview2.selectedRowId].name}}

    • 转到高级选项卡并设置事件处理程序以取消设置变量- currentLoadingId

    • 将查询保存为urlfordownload
    • 转到列表视图小部件并单击其句柄以编辑其属性。
    • 添加两个事件处理程序 - 一个为 On row click 事件设置变量currentLoadingId 并将其值设置为{{queries.listFiles.data.files[components.listview2.selectedRowId].id}} }
    • 另一个处理程序来运行urlfordownload查询。
    • 现在您可以单击列表视图小部件上的一行，它将启动urlfordownload查询。

    惊人的！ 我们已经成功构建了所有查询并与 UI 连接。

    现在终于从应用编辑器的右上角发布您的应用程序。

    您已成功为您的 Google Cloud Storage 创建了文件资源管理器应用程序。 如果您对使用 ToolJet 构建应用程序有任何疑问，或者只是想在低代码应用程序开发人员社区中闲逛，只需在我们的Slack 社区中给我们打个招呼。 卡兰·普拉塔普·辛格—— 一旦暂停，tooljet 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

原文:

In this tutorial, we will build an internal tool for reading, downloading and uploading files to the buckets in Google Cloud Storage.

Google Cloud Storage (GCS) is the global, secure, and scalable object storage for immutable data such as images, texts, videos, or any other file format. Objects are stored in buckets that are associated with a project, which are grouped under an organization.

What you'll need to build the GCS file explorer?

  • ToolJet (https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet): A free and open-source low-code platform that allows you to quickly build applications. You can create a free account on ToolJet Cloud or run it on your local machine.
  • Google Cloud Storage (GCS): JSON private key for the service account required for connecting ToolJet to GCS

Bonus: Download the exported application from here and import it to your ToolJet account to use it straight away.

Here's a glimpse of the application:

Without further ado, let's start building the application.

Building the UI of GCS file explorer

Let's start with building the UI for Explorer. Login to the ToolJet and then on the Dashboard, click on the Create new application button to create a new app. Once the app is created, you will be redirected to the visual app editor. You can change the name of the app by editing the default name i.e Untitled app from the top left of the app builder.

Visual app editor has 4 sections:

  • Canvas at the center, where you'll drag and drop widgets to build UI.
  • Query editor at the bottom, where you can create queries.
  • On the right sidebar, you'll find Widget Manager that has a list of built-in widgets and components. You can drag and drop to start building out user interface.
  • On the left sidebar, you'll see the Inspector, debugger, comments, settings, and Datasource manager. Datasource manager is used to add a new datasource or manage the connected datasource.

Let's build the UI

For building the user interface, you’ll need to drag and drop the following components from the Widget Manager(right sidebar) and place them accordingly.

Here is the configuration of widgets that I used for building the UI:

  • A Container as header and Text widget inside the container to give a title to the app i.e GCS File Explorer

  • Another container below the header that will contain all the sections of the application. Give this container a background color of your choice from the Styles.

  • Let's add a text widget in the center and set the text to Please select a bucket - we will display this text by conditionally disabling the visibility of the container that we will add on top of this text widget.

  • Let's drag a container on top of the text widget, and put list view widget inside the container. You can also use text widgets to set columns names- Name, Updated on, Size, and Actions.

  • In the List view widget, use text widget for name, updated on, and size. Use Image widget for the Action. User will click on the download image to download the object from the GCS.

  • Set the following field value for the three text widgets Name, Updated on, and Size as {{listItem.name}}, {{moment(listItem).format("DD/MM/YYYY h:mm:ss a")}}, and {{(listItem.size/1024).toFixed(2)}} kb respectively. In the image widget set the loading state value to {{listItem.id === variables.currentlyLoadingId}} , and add the event handler to open the webpage {{queries.urlfordownload.data.url}}

  • Drag a button on the right side of the container that will be used to trigger the dialog for choosing the bucket.

  • Drag a modal somewhere below the container, go to the button properties and set the event handler to show the modal that you have added.

  • Click on the button to show the modal, and then you can drag and drop dropdown and button widget inside the modal to build the modal UI. The dropdown will include the list of buckets that we will retrieve from the query, and the button will have an event handler to fire the query for listing the files from the selected bucket.

  • Let's add text widget next to button for showing up the currently selected bucket. Set the text value as {{components.dropdown1.value}}

  • Now, the last section of the UI - the upload section. We will build this section inside a container. We will be using text, divider, text input, file picker and button widget to build the section. The button widget will include an event handler for firing up the upload query that we will create later.

💡 Check the documentation to learn more about customising the widgets and beautifying the UI. ✨

Now, we are done building the UI - let's move forward with connecting the Google Cloud Storage and build the queries.

Connecting the GCS datasource and creating queries

Before creating the queries let's connect the GCS datasource first:

  • Go to the datasource manager on the left sidebar and click on + button to add a new datasource.
  • Search and click on Google Cloud Storage.
  • Enter and save the JSON private key for the service account
  • You can click on Test connection button to check the connection and then click on Save button to save the datasource.
  • Now, we are good to go for creating queries.

For this application, we will need to build the queries for:

  • JavaScript code for triggering show modal action
  • Listing the buckets from GCS
  • Listing the object/files from the selected bucket
  • Uploading the file to the selected bucket
  • Creating signed URL for downloading the file from the bucket

JavaScript code for triggering show modal action

  • Go to the Query Panel, and click on the + button Create a new JavaScript code query and enter the following code for triggering the show modal action: 
actions.showModal('modal1')

  • Go to the Advanced tab, toggle on the Run query on page load? option, and save the query as showModalOnPageLoad. Enabling Run query on page load option will display the modal every time the app is loaded - giving users the flexibility to choose the bucket before moving to other app functions.

Listing the buckets from GCS

  • Go to the Query Panel, and click on the + button to create a new query
  • Select Google Cloud Storage as the datasource
  • In the operations dropdown, select the List buckets option

  • Go to the Advanced tab, toggle on the Run query on page load? option, and click Save and Run button.
  • Let's open up the modal by clicking on the change button, and then edit the properties of the dropdown inside the modal. Set the Option Values and Option Label as {{queries.listBuckets.data.buckets}} , Default value to {{queries.listBuckets.data.buckets[0]}}, and Options loading state to {{queries.listBuckets.isLoading}}

Listing the object/files from the selected bucket

  • Go to the Query Panel, and click on the + button to create a new query
  • Select Google Cloud Storage as the datasource
  • In the operations dropdown, select the List files in a bucket option
  • In Bucket field, use JS to dynamically get the value from the selected option in the dropdown widget - {{components.dropdown1.value}}

  • Now, go to Advanced tab and add an event handler to close the modal once the query is successful.
  • Save and run the query as listFiles

  • Let's open up the modal by clicking on the change button, and then edit the properties of the button that is inside the modal. Add an event handler for running the listFiles query for On Click event.

  • Go to the list view widget and connect the data returned by the query. Set list data field value to {{queries.listFiles.data.files}}

Uploading the file to the selected bucket

  • Go to the Query Panel, and click on the + button to create a new query
  • Select Google Cloud Storage as the datasource
  • In the operations dropdown, select the Upload file option
  • In the Bucket field enter {{components.dropdown1.value}} , File name field enter {{components.textinput1.value}} , Content type field enter {{components.filepicker1.file[0].type}} , Upload data field enter {{components.filepicker1.file[0].content}} , and set Encoding to utf8

  • Go to Advanced tab and add the two event handlers, one to run the listFiles query for On Success event. This will reload the list of files in the listview widget.

  • And the other event handler to set component specific action for file picker that will clear the file from the widget once the query is successful.

  • Save and run the query as upload.

Creating signed URL for downloading the file from the bucket

  • Go to the Query Panel, and click on the + button to create a new query
  • Select Google Cloud Storage as the datasource
  • In the operations dropdown, select the Signed URL for download option
  • In the Bucket field enter {{components.dropdown1.value}}, and in File name field enter {{queries.listFiles.data.files[components.listview2.selectedRowId].name}}

  • Go to the Advanced tab and set an event handler to unset a variable - currentlyLoadingId

  • Save the query as urlfordownload
  • Go to the list view widget and click on its handle to edit its properties.
  • Add the two event handlers- one to set a variable currentlyLoadingId for On row click event and set its value to {{queries.listFiles.data.files[components.listview2.selectedRowId].id}}
  • And the other handler to run the urlfordownload query.
  • Now you can click one on row on the list view widget and it will fire up the urlfordownload query.

Awesome! We have successfully built all the queries and connected with the UI.

And now FINALLY just Release your application from the top right corner of the app editor.

You have successfully created a File explorer app for your Google Cloud Storage. 🎉

If you have any queries related to building applications with ToolJet or just want to hangout in the community of low-code application developers the just drop us a Hi in our Slack Community. 🚀

Karan Pratap Singh - Aug 19

Items.Description:
佐帕托尔斯克

发表于它说填写这张表格可以节省 100 个小时，所以，让我们开始吧。

  1. 你的想法是什么（单行）？ 多人电影琐事/问答游戏
  2. 机会大小是多少？ 你的目标受众是谁？ 没有，或者我..？
  3. 什么是/是什么问题？ 我
  4. 什么是解决方案？ 还有我
  5. 你如何通过它获利？ 我不
  6. 其他选择是什么？ 在 Netflix 上观看韩剧。

是的，只花了几秒钟，从一开始就应该这样做……我现在节省了很多时间，我可以在晚上剩下的时间在 Netflix 上看韩剧。

新的一天，新的开发日志

所以，是的，我昨天开始写这篇文章，是的，我晚上大部分时间都在看韩剧；）..但是，是的，我也做了一些重构.. 我的一个儿子抱怨代码很丑所以放弃了一些嵌套的 if's n 将一些早期返回 n 的东西代替。

在使用套接字时做了一些更多的故障预防工作，如果用户断开连接但您仍在运行代码，这些可能会在任何时候变得未定义，但很容易崩溃。 我想在拉动之前尽可能多地防止这种情况发生

 process . on ( " uncaughtException " , function ( err ) { console . log ( " Keep it alive!!: " , err ); });

为了防止某些功能无法完成时服务器崩溃！

什么是新的！

好吧，我一直在努力使“琐事游戏引擎”更加通用。
所以我需要一种能够轻松定义新类型问题的方法。

类是显而易见的答案，我喜欢类，因为我可以将方法和数据封装到一个实体中。

所以我创建了一个基类，它已经定义了公共字段和方法，并且用于创建和自定义你自己的问题类型可以扩展它并覆盖你想要的。

当前的实现..如果我需要添加更多东西可能会有所改变

基本问题

module . exports = class BaseQuestion { constructor ({ type = ' pic-one ' , title = ' pick one ' , question = ' question text ' , correctAnswer = ' correct answer ' , answers = [ ' correct answer ' , ' wrong answer ' ] } = {}) { if ( this . constructor == BaseQuestion ) throw new Error ( " Abstract classes can't be instantiated. " ); this . type = type ; this . title = title ; this . question = question ; //question text this . correctAnswer = correctAnswer ; //correct answer this . answers = answers ; //array of answer alternatives } isAnswerCorrect ( answer ) { return answer === this . correctAnswer ; } calculateScore ( answer , time ) { if ( this . isAnswerCorrect ( answer )) return 100 + time * 10 ; else return 0 ; } };

我还通过扩展它并更改了评分系统来创建一个新课程。

 const BaseQuestion = require ( ' ./BaseQuestion ' ); module . exports = class PickOne extends BaseQuestion { constructor (... args ) { super (... args ); } calculateScore ( answer , time ) { if ( this . isAnswerCorrect ( answer )) return 100 + time * 100 ; else return 0 ; } };

只是为了测试一下，我想看看是否可以轻松实现不同的问题提供者，而不仅仅是使用硬编码的问题。 谷歌 2 秒后，我找到了开放的琐事数据库..

在 generateQuestions() 函数中拼凑一些代码

const axios = require ( ' axios ' ); const he = require ( ' he ' ); const PickOne = require ( ' ../questions/PickOne ' ); const { shuffleArray } = require ( ' ./functions ' ); module . exports = async function generateQuestions ( no ) { try { const { data } = await axios . get ( `https://opentdb.com/api.php?amount= ${ no } &type=multiple` ); const selectedQuestions = []; data . results . forEach (( element ) => { const answers = shuffleArray ( element . incorrect_answers . concat ( element . correct_answer )); selectedQuestions . push ( new PickOne ({ question : he . decode ( element . question ), answers : answers , correctAnswer : element . correct_answer , type : ' pick-one ' })); }); return selectedQuestions ; } catch ( error ) { console . log ( error ); return []; } };

那个没有错误处理，但谁在乎它只是一个快速测试..

顺便说一句，我确实通过在随机答案上单击鼠标而不阅读问题得到了正确答案，因为 bz 在时间用完之前做了屏幕截图.. 技能还是运气？ 是的，仍然需要处理 CSS n 垃圾，但是是的，稍后.. 现在不重要.. 将继续实现核心功能。

接下来是：

  • 游戏浏览器，只是可以加入的游戏列表和统计信息
  • 创建游戏的设置。 只是前端代码，后端已经准备好了
  • 显示游戏结果。
  • 聊天功能，可以考虑在游戏中聊天和全球聊天。 至少不难实现，可能像后端的 2 行代码或其他东西（一个用于全局，一个用于游戏；））
  • 加载器组件，如果 nee 当东西是 bz 时可以显示在前端。（只有在稍后连接非常慢并且问题就像基于图像并且需要在回合开始之前预加载时才会显示）。

但是，是的，如果感觉它可能只是重做一些当前的 CSS。

Zoppatorsk

Posted on Aug 22

So i read this post. It says I will save 100 hours by filling out this form, so yeah let's do it.

  1. What's your idea(one-liner)? A multiplayer movie trivia/quiz game
  2. What's the opportunity size? 0$
  3. Who's your target audience? none, or maybe me..?
  4. What is/are the problem(s)? Me
  5. What is/are the solution(s)? Also me
  6. How do you monetize it? I don't
  7. What are the other alternatives? Watch Korean dramas on Netflix.

Yeah, that only took some seconds, should have done that from the start... I have now saved so much time I can spend the rest of the evening watching Korean dramas on Netflix.

New day, new devlog

So, yeah, I started writing this yesterday and yeah, I mostly spent the evening watching a Korean drama ;) .. but yeah, I did get some refactoring done also.. one of my sons complained that the code was ugly so got rid of some nested if's n put some early returns n stuff instead.

Made some more fault prevention stuff, when working with sockets and those can get undefined at any moment if a user disconnects but you are still running code things crash easily. I want to prevent as much of that as possible before pulling a

process.on("uncaughtException", function (err) {
console.log("Keep it alive!!: ", err);
});

To prevent server crash when some function cant finish!

What's new!

Well, I have kept working on making the "trivia game engine" more universal.
So I needed a way to be able to easily define new types of questions.

Class was the obvious answer, I like classes in the way I can encapsulate both methods and data into one entity.

So I created a base-class that have the common fields and methods already defined and for creating and customize your own question type can just extend it and override what u want.

Current implementation.. Will probably change a little if I need to add more stuff

BaseQuestion

module.exports = class BaseQuestion { constructor({ type = 'pic-one', title = 'pick one', question = 'question text', correctAnswer = 'correct answer', answers = ['correct answer', 'wrong answer'] } = {}) { if (this.constructor == BaseQuestion) throw new Error("Abstract classes can't be instantiated."); this.type = type; this.title = title; this.question = question; //question text this.correctAnswer = correctAnswer; //correct answer this.answers = answers; //array of answer alternatives } isAnswerCorrect(answer) { return answer === this.correctAnswer; } calculateScore(answer, time) { if (this.isAnswerCorrect(answer)) return 100 + time * 10; else return 0; }
};

I also made a new class by extending it and change the score system.

const BaseQuestion = require('./BaseQuestion');
module.exports = class PickOne extends BaseQuestion { constructor(...args) { super(...args); } calculateScore(answer, time) { if (this.isAnswerCorrect(answer)) return 100 + time * 100; else return 0; }
};

And just to test things out I wanted to see if could easily implement a different question provider instead of just using hard coded questions. After a 2 second google i found open trivia database..

Threw together some code in the generateQuestions() function

const axios = require('axios');
const he = require('he');
const PickOne = require('../questions/PickOne');
const { shuffleArray } = require('./functions'); module.exports = async function generateQuestions(no) { try { const { data } = await axios.get(`https://opentdb.com/api.php?amount=${no}&type=multiple`); const selectedQuestions = []; data.results.forEach((element) => { const answers = shuffleArray(element.incorrect_answers.concat(element.correct_answer)); selectedQuestions.push(new PickOne({ question: he.decode(element.question), answers: answers, correctAnswer: element.correct_answer, type: 'pick-one' })); }); return selectedQuestions; } catch (error) { console.log(error); return []; }
};

No error handling in that one, but who cares it was just a quick test..

n.. see.. we now have an actual trivia game going..

BTW, I did get the correct answer by just clicking mouse on random answer without reading the question cuz was bz doing screen shot before time ran out.. skill or luck?? ;)

Yes, still need to work on the CSS n junk, but yeah, later.. it is not important for now.. will keep implementing the core features.

Next up are:

  • Game browser, just a list of games that can join and the stats
  • Settings for creating game. Just frontend code, backend is already prepared
  • Display game results.
  • chat functionality, thinking maybe booth an in game chat and a global chat. Not hard to implement at least, probably like 2 lines of code or something on the backend ( one for global and one for game ;) )
  • loader component that can show on frontend if nee when stuff is bz.. (only really will be shown if have really slow connection later and the questions are like image based and need to be preloaded before round starts).

But yeah, if feel for it might just redo some of the current CSS.

Items.Description:
您知道连接英国和法国的 50 公里欧洲隧道需要 13,000 名工人和工程师才能完成吗？ 这只是一个没有有效规划和协调就不可能实现的项目的一个例子。 在本文中，我们讨论了为什么 PM 很重要，并涵盖了基本的项目管理基础知识，以防您想自己进入业务。

目录 [隐藏]

项目管理协会将项目管理定义为“使用特定的知识、技能、工具和技术为人们提供有价值的东西”。

想想一艘 1,300 英尺的集装箱船、一座住宅楼，或者……耗资 1500 亿美元建造的国际空间站 (ICS)。

如今，我们主要在软件开发的背景下考虑项目管理。 但无论行业如何，项目通常会在四个不同的项目阶段展开：

  • 项目管理旨在减少这些阶段的摩擦。 它还可以帮助项目团队满足客户的期望，同时保持在设定的时间表和预算内。

    几个世纪以来，人们一直在管理项目。 金字塔、万里长城、著名的罗马古道，都需要数千人的共同努力才能完成。

    当然，我们没有现在拥有的项目管理工具和框架。 但核心前提——管理时间、人员和资源——几千年来并没有发生太大变化。 那么，项目管理这一门学科是什么时候正式开始的呢？

    一些消息来源指向美国工程师亨利·劳伦斯·甘特。 如果这个名字听起来很熟悉，那是因为在 1900 年代初期，甘特开发了（惊喜，惊喜）甘特图。

    亨利劳伦斯甘特的原始甘特图^(1)^

    甘特图是以条形图的形式可视化项目进度的突破性工具。 它很快被许多行业采用，并用于胡佛水坝建设等项目，该项目在 1931 年至 1936 年间雇佣了 5,000 多名工人。

    然而，甘特的修改后的设计在西方世界变得更流行，所以这个名字被保留了下来。

    它以两种 PM 工具达到高潮：由 Booz-Allen & Hamilton Corporation 开发的项目评估和审查技术 (PERT) 和关键路径方法 (CPM)，两者至今仍在使用。

    在 1980 年代，项目管理协会着手整合现有的项目管理策略。 这导致了项目管理知识体系（PMBOK）的出版。

    他们说，剩下的就是历史了。

    我们从哪里开始？ 我们需要什么资源和工具？ 该项目需要多长时间？ 它要花多少钱？ 最重要的是，“成功”是什么意思？

    项目管理工具和策略回答了所有这些问题。 他们还帮助项目经理拼凑项目拼图，特别是：

    • 外部观察者和利益相关者通常会看到表面上的东西——最终产品、软件或季度利润的增加。

      但项目管理的价值，尤其是在有效执行时，隐藏在表面之下。 是无形的脚手架使项目从头到尾保持在正常的轨道上。

      项目团队是参与项目计划和执行的一组人员。

      项目团队的每个成员对成功或失败负有同等责任。 至少在理论上，因为即使是扁平结构的团队通常也会被划分为关键角色：

      项目经理👑 项目负责人🧐 业务分析师⚙️ 项目组成员👨‍💻
      跟踪进度/里程碑协助项目经理识别过程改进处理可交付成果
      评估团队绩效组建项目团队记录业务需求设计、编码和测试
      定义项目范围和规格确保利益相关者的支持收集项目需求向 PM 报告进度
      计划和时间表工作支持项目团队与利益相关者密切合作优先考虑任务和依赖关系
      识别和降低风险创建项目愿景支持项目实施识别和解决问题

      这些角色可以有不同的名称，具体取决于框架、组织文化和项目本身。 一个例子是 Scrum Master 在 Scrum 团队中的角色。

      当然，项目经理占据中心位置。 当他们的团队达到项目目标时，他们会得到表扬。 当项目失败时，他们也会承担责任。

      项目团队可以是职能型的——个人成员代表公司内的不同领域——也可以是跨职能的，每个成员都会带来不同的技能组合。

      该项目历时 13 年完成，耗资近 60 亿美元（经通货膨胀调整）。

      有时边界充其量是模糊的。 例如，用于实施敏捷的 Spotify 模型将团队成员分组为灵活的小队和公会。 团队成员可以在这些单位之间自由迁移，这极大地增加了整个公司的创新能力。

      您可能想知道项目管理和任务管理之间有什么区别。 毕竟，如今两者似乎几乎可以互换使用。

      假设您正在设计一种新的自动割草机模型（它们现在风靡一时）。 那是您的项目带有一个大“P”。 但是从最初的设计到生产的道路很长，因此您需要将项目划分为增量。 这就是任务管理发挥作用的地方。

      管理项目意味着在宏观范围内协调人员、资源和工作。 管理任务也是在做同样的事情——加上委派/完成任务——在微观上。

      典型的任务管理活动包括：

      • 虽然项目是集体努力，但任务通常分配给特定的团队成员。 这些团队成员负责完成它们并报告进度。

        有些任务可以并行处理。 有些是其他任务的先决条件（或子任务），因此项目团队需要先完成它们。 有效的任务管理可确保各个任务在正确的时间由正确的人完成。

        项目管理方法论是一组为客户提供价值的工具、原则和策略。 有许多流行的项目管理框架。 有些提供更灵活的方法，而另一些则本质上是线性和顺序的。

        项目管理方法有助于项目团队：

        • 如果您想轻松管理项目，则需要为工作选择正确的方法。 以下是您需要了解的一些流行的项目管理方法。

          它将项目划分为称为 Sprint 的增量。 教育和指导项目团队的 Scrum master 的角色

        • 自组织和跨职能团队自主工作
        • 强调与利益相关者的有效协作和沟通

        瀑布

        瀑布模型是一种传统的项目管理方法。 它起源于 70 年代，在敏捷接管之前一直是软件开发中领先的项目管理方法。 瀑布将项目组织成线性的、连续的阶段。

        • 项目分为分析、设计、实施、测试和运行阶段
        • 客户不参与关键项目里程碑之外
        • 团队可以包括开发人员、测试人员、业务分析师和项目经理
        • 与 Scrum 等敏捷方法相比，灵活性较低

        倾斜

        这是项目管理的另一种敏捷方法，尽管它通常被称为“思维方式”而不是方法论。 精益项目管理起源于二战后的制造业，专注于提高生产力和减少浪费（ Muda ）。

        • 以客户为中心，专注于提供尽可能多的价值
        • 以小增量交付工作的跨职能团队
        • 以减少三种废弃物（3m）为目标——Muda、Muri、Mura
        • 鼓励持续改进业务流程

        在计算机时代之前，项目管理并不有趣。 一点都没有。

        项目经理——如果你可以这么称呼他们的话——使用传统的笔和纸方法来管理资源并跟踪进度。 好消息是您不再需要在石桌上跟踪您的 KPI（呸）。 现代项目管理软件让您：

      星期一网

    或者至少它不是一开始的。 该应用程序围绕文档、数据库和无限定制展开。 尽管任务管理和通信功能有限，但它仍然是创意团队的可靠选择。

    我们在本文中介绍的项目管理基础知识应该让您更好地了解项目管理世界。 但是学习时间还远没有结束！

    一定要扩展您的知识，参加项目管理课程，并与业务中的其他人联系，以掌握最新的行业趋势、工具和策略。
